Commentary leans on "But he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open fields, and make an atoneme...". Cross references echo "Holy".

11: The priest who performs the cleansing will place the person who is to be cleansed
14: The priest is to take some of the blood from the guilt offering and put it on the lobe of the right ear of the one to be cleansed
17: From the oil remaining in his palm the priest will put some on the lobe of the right ear of the one to be cleansed
18: What is left of the oil in the priest’s palm he is to put on the head of the one to be cleansed
